mapper.sql: id, user_id, name, slug, description, cover_image, article_count, read_count, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time, deleted, deleted_time
mapper.select:
select
from `column` where id = #{id} and deleted = 0

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.slug, c.description, c.cover_image, c.article_count, c.read_count, c.sort_order, c.status, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.user_id, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.signature FROM `column` c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.deleted = 0

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.slug, c.description, c.cover_image, c.article_count, c.read_count, c.sort_order, c.status, c.create_time, c.update_time, c.user_id, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM `column` c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.deleted = 0 AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.read_count DESC, c.article_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, name, slug, description, cover_image, article_count, read_count, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time FROM `column` WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time DESC

select
from `column` where slug = #{slug} and deleted = 0

select
from `column` where name = #{name} and user_id = #{userId} and deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `column` (user_id, name, slug, description, cover_image, article_count, read_count, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{slug}, #{description}, #{coverImage}, #{articleCount}, #{readCount}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE `column` SET article_count = article_count + #{offset}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE `column` SET read_count = read_count + #{offset}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE `column` SET deleted = 1, deleted_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
